report.summary: Community growth cycle v17 (Mar 16): BTCFi guide ($7B+ TVL, Babylon/Stacks/Rootstock/BOB) as lead Monday thread; Aave V4 Hub & Spoke thread + single tweet for Tuesday; Kaito AI/InfoFi attention markets drop + FOMC Day prep tweet for Wednesday; exchange reviews batch teaser in Discord; Thursday newsletter section updated with all new guides; 2 SVG social cards created (social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg + social-aave-v4-guide.svg); posting schedule extended through Friday community poll.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Monday PM, 6 posts): BTCFi launch — hook on 'Bitcoin crossed $7B DeFi TVL'; Babylon Protocol native staking ($4.5B staked); Stacks sBTC 5-7% APY; Rootstock EVM sidechain $500M TVL; BOB hybrid chain 8-15% APY; honest risk section; CTA to /learn/btcfi-bitcoin-defi-guide-2026
Tweet (Monday PM, punchy): BTCFi TVL $0 in 2020 → $7B+ in 2026 — 4-protocol stack breakdown; CTA to guide
Discord/Telegram (Monday PM): BTCFi drop announcement — 4 protocols, yield ranges, risk note, direct link

Twitter thread (Tuesday, 5 posts): Aave V4 Hub & Spoke deep-dive — unified liquidity layer concept; hub vs spoke model; what changes for lenders (better APY), borrowers (dynamic risk premiums), $AAVE holders (fee switch live); V4 vs V3 plain-English; CTA to /learn/aave-v4-guide
Tweet (Tuesday, single): Aave V4 restructured $20B DeFi lending — unified liquidity, dynamic risk premiums, GHO auto-yield, Horizon RWA; CTA to guide
Tweet (Wednesday AM): FOMC meeting March 19 — historical rate-hold vs cut patterns for BTC; FOMC week as DCA entry window; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator
Tweet (Wednesday): Kaito AI/InfoFi drop — attention as alpha, Polymarket Attention Markets, KAITO mindshare scoring; CTA to /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide
Discord/Telegram (Wednesday): Exchange reviews coming soon teaser — Binance, Kraken, Bybit, OKX full reviews; 🔥 engagement poll (which review first?)

Newsletter (Thursday Mar 19): 3 subject line options; market pulse ($BTC $71K, Pectra T-24, FOMC hold, Aave V4, Kaito Attention Markets); New on degen0x: BTCFi guide + Aave V4 + Kaito AI/InfoFi + exchange reviews; Worth Reading: EIP-7702 + Crypto Tax 30-day countdown; Degen Corner: BTCFi APY compression thesis + 90-day window framing
Twitter poll (Friday Mar 20): Feature vote — Options Chain Viewer vs BTCFi Yield Tracker vs Wallet PnL Analyzer vs Gas Fee Optimizer; feeds Sprint 59 prioritization

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark amber/orange BTC theme; left panel: BTCFi title with orange gradient, $7B+ TVL badge, 'no wrapping' native staking badge; right panel: 4-protocol glass cards (Babylon $4.5B staked, Stacks 5-7% APY, Rootstock $500M TVL, BOB 8-15% APY), each color-coded (amber/indigo/cyan/purple); brand top bar orange-to-red; degen0x logo top-left. Saved to /public/social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg

social-aave-v4-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: deep indigo/purple DeFi theme; left panel: Aave V4 title with purple gradient, 3 stat badges ($20B+ managed, 30+ chains, GHO auto-yield), 3 bullet points of key changes; right panel: interactive hub-and-spoke architecture diagram with center 'Unified Liquidity Hub' + 6 spoke nodes (Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Horizon RWA, Polygon, GHO), dashed connector lines in indigo. Saved to /public/social-aave-v4-guide.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: Site is Day 16 — GSC organic signals may land imminently (day 14-21 window). Previous v16 cycle covered Bloomberg Screener live data, EIP-7702, Bitcoin Treasury Companies, Crypto Debit Cards, Tax guide, GENIUS Act, Meme Launchpads. v17 advances into BTCFi, Aave V4, Kaito AI/InfoFi — all queued pages or recently published.
BTCFi narrative is time-sensitive: Babylon Protocol pre-mainnet-incentives window = highest APY period; 90-day compression thesis creates urgency for content amplification now.
Aave V4 Hub & Spoke is a major DeFi protocol upgrade affecting $20B in managed assets — broad audience (lenders, borrowers, $AAVE holders). Architecture diagram in social card is highly shareable.
Kaito AI/InfoFi + Polymarket Attention Markets is the white-hot narrative of March 2026. Timing this drop with the guide publish maximizes engagement spike.
FOMC meeting March 19 creates a natural macro anchor for DCA calculator CTA — historically one of the strongest engagement triggers for non-crypto-native audiences.
Exchange reviews batch (Binance/Kraken/Bybit/OKX) Discord teaser with engagement poll generates anticipation before publish + gives affiliate revenue pages a community launch boost.
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v17.md
Social cards saved to /public/social-btcfi-guide-2026.svg and /public/social-aave-v4-guide.svg
Posting schedule: Mon PM BTCFi thread + Discord → Tue Aave V4 thread → Wed FOMC + Kaito + Exchange reviews teaser → Thu newsletter → Fri community poll
